metadata.title: WordsGo - Magaral Vocabulary gamit ing AI & Spaced Repetition
metadata.description: I-boost ing kekang kabyasnan king amanu gamit ing AI-powered spaced repetition. Gawa kang sariling listahan ding amanu o magaral kareng public list a sinese ning komunidad.
metadata.keywords: magaral English, spaced repetition, vocabulary builder, flashcards, AI pamagaral amanu, listahan ding amanu, language study app, magaral Spanish, magaral French, magaral German, kabyasnan king amanu, tandaan ding amanu, SRS learning
metadata.og_description: I-boost ing kekang kabyasnan king amanu gamit ing AI-powered spaced repetition. Magaral mas mabilis, tandaan mas matalub.
metadata.og_image_alt: WordsGo AI Language Learning App Interface
metadata.twitter_title: WordsGo - Magaral Bayung Amanu king Mayap a Paraan
metadata.twitter_description: Makiabe king WordsGo para palakbangon ing kekang vocabulary gamit ing matalino a spaced repetition at AI.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Magaral {target} ibat king {source}
dashboard.community_lists_desc: I-explore deng listahan ding amanu at playlist ning aliwang user.
dashboard.ai_practice_desc: I-improve ing kekang vocabulary gamit ing pamanaliwa ding sentence a gawa ning AI basi king paksang pinili mu o king listahan mu.
dashboard.manage_words_desc: Lawan, i-search, i-edit o i-delete deng amanu king kekang koleksyon.
dashboard.import_error_retry: E mi na-save ing kekang bayung amanu. Subukan tamu pasibayu!
dashboard.generate_word_list_error: E na-gawa ing listahan ding amanu.
dashboard.select_topic_error: Mamili ka sanang paksa o isulat ing kekang sariling konteksto.
dashboard.ai_translation_notice: Ing AI sumaup ya king kahulugan at alimbawa ning sentence
dashboard.delete_confirm: Sigurado ka waring i-delete ya ining amanu?
dashboard.delete_all_confirm: Sigurado ka waring i-delete LAHAT deng amanu mu? Ining aksyon e na mabayu.
dashboard.no_words_found: Alang amanung ikit. Subukan ing aliwang amanu o mag-dagdag amanu!
dashboard.no_words_for_lesson: Alang amanung ikit para pagaralan. Mag-dagdag ka sanang bayung amanu king listahan mu!
dashboard.no_words_to_review: Alang amanu para i-rebyu ngeni. Mibalik ka potang kayi o mag-dagdag bayung amanu!
dashboard.lesson_complete_desc: Magaling! Na-rebyu mu na deng amanu mu para ngening aldo.
dashboard.practice_setup_desc: Mag-isulat ka paksang para gawan daka ring sariling sentence para king pratiks!
dashboard.practice_topic_hint: Nung alang laman, gawa yang sentence basi king vocabulary mu.
dashboard.footer_help_text: Saupan mu kaming mag-improve! I-share deng kekang ideya, i-report deng bug, o mag-request bayung features:
dashboard.support_desc: Nung buri mu ining app, malyari mung suportan ing kayang panyulung.

onboarding.journey_begins: Keni mag-umpisa ing kekang pamanigaral amanu.
onboarding.best_practice: Pinakamayap a Paraan para king Tagumpay
onboarding.strategy_desc: Para makinabang kang mayap king WordsGo, i-rekomenda mi ining simpling istratehiya:
onboarding.step1_desc: Mag-dagdag mga 100 amanu tungkul king metung a paksa (alimbawa: Bisnes o Pamaglakbe) para mika matas a konteksto.
onboarding.step2_desc: Kabyasnan mu la rening amanu gamit ing aldoldo pamanulit anggang maging dake no ning vocabulary mu.
onboarding.step3_desc: Munta king AI Pratiks para gamitan deng bayung amanu mu kareng buung sentence at sitwasyon king tutung bye.

dashboard.generate_ai_title: Gawa kang Listahan ding Amanu gamit ing AI
dashboard.custom_topic_label: Ing sarili mung paksa o konteksto (opsyonal)
dashboard.custom_topic_placeholder: alimbawa: Amanu para king business meeting tungkul king marketing
dashboard.publish_desc: I-share ining koleksyon ding {count} amanu kareng aliwang user. Lalto ya king gallery ning Listahan ning Publiku.
dashboard.publish_success: Ing listahan ding amanu matagumpay a na-publish!
dashboard.publish_error: E na-publish ing listahan ding amanu.
dashboard.duplicate_word_error: Ing amanu "{word}" atyu na king listahan
dashboard.inline_add_error: I-provide ya sana ing orihinal a amanu at pamanaliwa
dashboard.save_batch_success: Matagumpay a na-save ing {count} amanu king listahan mu!
dashboard.save_batch_error: E na-save deng amanu. Subukan pasibayu.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_error: I-remove mu la sanang paulit-ulit a amanu bago i-save.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_publish_error: I-remove mu la sanang paulit-ulit a amanu bago i-publish.

ai_word_info.error_coffee_break: Ing AI mag-coffee break ya pa. Subukan pasibayu king aliwang saglit!
ai_word_info.error_generic: Ay! E mi akua ing AI insights. Subukan tamu pasibayu!

public_lists.title: Listahan ning Publiku ding Amanu
public_lists.subtitle: I-explore deng listahan ding amanu a gawa ding aliwang user para kareng amanu mu.
public_lists.search_placeholder: I-search deng listahan gamit ing pamagat o deskripsyon...
public_lists.no_lists_desc: Subukan ing aliwang paman-search o alilan ing language filters.
public_lists.show_all_langs: I-pakit deng listahan para king lahat ding amanu
public_lists.load_error: E mi ma-load deng listahan ning publiku ngeni.
public_lists.playlists_no_lists: Alang listahan ning publiku a malyari

detail.title: Detalye ning Listahan
detail.added_success: Deng amanu matagumpay a na-dagdag king kekang koleksyon!
detail.added_error: E na-dagdag deng amanu king kekang koleksyon.
detail.delete_confirm: Sigurado ka waring i-delete ining listahan ning publiku? Ining aksyon e na mabayu.
detail.duplicate_error: Atin paulit-ulit a amanu king listahan. I-remove mu la sana bago i-save.

profile.terms_welcome: Malaus king WordsGo. King pamagamit mu king serbisyo tamu, payabe ka kening kasunduan...
profile.title: Settings ning Profile
profile.leave_empty: Paburen yang alang laman para panatilyan ing kasalungsungang password
profile.subtitle: I-manage ing kekang personal a impormasyon at language settings

register.title: Gawa kang account
register.password_hint: Dapat atin yang 8 o mas dakal a characters

best_practice.title: Pinakamayap a Paraan para king Tagumpay
best_practice.strategy_desc: Para king pinaka-epektibung pamanigaral, i-rekomenda mi ining simpling 3-hakbang a istratehiya:
best_practice.step1_desc: Mag-dagdag mga 100 amanu a nakatutok king metung a paksa (alimbawa: Pamaglakbe o Bisnes) para gawang konteksto.
best_practice.step2_desc: Kabyasnan mu la rening amanu gamit ing aldoldo pamanulit anggang maging dake no ning vocabulary mu.
best_practice.step3_desc: Munta king AI Pratiks para gamitan deng bayung amanu mu kareng buung sentence at tutung sitwasyon.

getting_started.title: Pamag-umpisa
getting_started.desc: Ing WordsGo metung yang masulung a gamit para saupan kang palakbangon ing kekang vocabulary at i-improve ing kabyasnan mu king amanu gamit ing spaced repetition at AI.
getting_started.step1_desc: Mag-dagdag amanu king sariling paraan o gamitan ing AI para gawang listahan basi king paksa at level.
getting_started.step2_desc: Gamitan ing Vocabulary Review para pamananda kareng amanu gamit ing FSRS algorithm.

manual.title: Manual a Pamag-input
manual.desc: I-type ya ing amanu king amanung pagaralan mu at ing kayang pamanaliwa. Malyari kang mag-dagdag komento o konteksto para king masanting a pamananda.

auto_translate.title: Auto-translate
auto_translate.desc: Gamitan ing "Auto-translate" feature para king mabilis a pamanaliwa gamit ing serbisyo ning DeepL.

ai_list.title: Pamagawa king Listahan (AI Word List)
ai_list.desc: Mamili level (A1-C2) at paksa, at ing AI (Gemini) gawa yang listahan ding amanu para keka, a malyaring i-dagdag king kekang dictionary king metung a click.

ai_insights.title: AI Insights
ai_insights.desc: Para kareng balang amanu, ing AI malyari yang mibiye synonyms, alimbawa ning pamanambit, at tips king gramatika.

spaced_repetition.title: Spaced Repetition
spaced_repetition.desc: Ing WordsGo gagamit yang FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) algorithm para i-kalkula ing pinakamayap a oras para ulitan ing balang amanu.
spaced_repetition.step1: I-pakit daka ring amanu king source language mu.
spaced_repetition.step2: I-type ya ing pamanaliwa at i-press ing Enter o Check Answer.
spaced_repetition.step3: Nung e mu atandanan — i-click ya ing "E ku atandanan" para akit ing sagot.
spaced_repetition.step4: Ing algorithm i-kalkula ne ing susunod a petsa ning rebyu basi king sagot mu.

ai_practice.title: AI Pratiks: Pamanaliwa ning Sentence
ai_practice.desc: Ining feature sasaup ya king pamanituru king gramatika at konteksto gamit ing pamanaliwa kareng buung sentence a gawa ning AI para keka.
ai_practice.step1: Mamili paksa (alimbawa: "Bisnes", "Pamaglakbe") o paburen yang alang laman.
ai_practice.step2: Ing AI gawa yang 5 sentence basi king paksang pinili mu.
ai_practice.step3: I-submit ing pamanaliwa mu at mika detailed breakdown.
ai_practice.step4: Ing AI i-point out ne ing maling mu at i-suggest ing pinakamayap a pamanaliwa at deskripsyon.

dictionary_management.title: Pamag-manage ning Dictionary
dictionary_management.search: Pamanyaliksik: Gamitan ing search bar para king mabilis a pamanyaliksik kareng amanu mu.
dictionary_management.sorting: Paman-sort: Lawan ing listahan ding lahat amanu mu at atin opsyong i-delete la.
dictionary_management.delete_all: I-delete lahat ding amanu: Malyaring i-clear ing buung dictionary mu king metung a click.

progress.title: Abante at Iskor
progress.desc: Ing iskor mu (king header ning app) i-pakit ne ing bilang ding amanu mu a tamang na-translate. Habang mas matas ing iskor mu, mas dakal na kang amanung matagumpay a na-aral!
